column1: Use this workbook for Lab 03. Start in APPOINTMENTS_FLAT.
You will add lookup formulas, create filters, build a pivot summary, and intentionally create flat-file problems.
Do not turn this into a database yet. The point is to experience why the spreadsheet starts to break.
BREED_REFERENCE — breed lookup table for animal type and average weights
DATA_DICTIONARY — field definitions and intended meaning
QUERY_AREA — place your FILTER formula here
PIVOT_SUMMARY — create your pivot table here
